overall.description: First-person gameplay footage showing exploration of a snowy alien landscape during golden hour. The player walks through snow-covered terrain with large rock formations and sparse vegetation, occasionally climbing over rocks. The environment features dramatic lighting with the sun low on the horizon, casting long shadows across the snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snow-covered terrain toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with visible footprints and texture
sparse silver-white frost-covered bushes scattered across the snow
massive dark rock outcrops rising from the snow field

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an open snow-covered landscape during golden hour. Sparse white vegetation dots the terrain while large rock formations loom in the distance. The sun sits low on the horizon, casting warm light across the cool-toned snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky outcrop with vertical climbable surfaces

events.description: player begins climbing up a large rock face, transitioning from walking to ascending

agents.ego_description: climbing up the textured surface of a large rock formation, using handholds and ledges

entered.detail: vertical rock wall with rough texture and climbing holds

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins climbing a large rock formation. The camera tilts upward to show the textured rock face close-up as the character ascends. The surrounding snow field becomes visible below as height is gained.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky valley passage between large boulders

events.description: descends from rock ledge back onto snow terrain and continues through valley

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow rocky valley, moving between large boulders and rock walls

entered.detail: tall rock walls forming a narrow passage through the terrain
loose rocks and boulders scattered across the snow path

segments.scene_description: After descending from the rock formation, the player moves through a narrow valley between large rock walls. The path winds through scattered boulders with the sun creating dramatic shadows. The terrain remains snow-covered with no vegetation visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to distant white tree grove

events.description: tall white trees become visible in the distance, marking a change in the landscape ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant grove of tall white trees while navigating around rock formations

entered.detail: tall, slender white trees with conical shapes visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow valley into a wider area with tall, distinctive white trees visible in the distance. The terrain remains rocky and snow-covered, but the view opens up to reveal the tree line ahead. The golden hour lighting creates a warm glow on the rocks and snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey across a snowy alien expanse that transitions from open plains to a narrow rocky corridor before opening onto a distant forest. It begins with a walk through a wide, snow-covered landscape dotted with sparse white vegetation under the warm glow of a low sun. As the camera approaches a massive rock formation, it tilts upward to capture the textured stone face during an ascent that reveals the sprawling snow fields below. The scene then shifts as the camera descends and winds through a narrow valley of towering rock walls and scattered boulders, where the lighting creates deep, dramatic shadows. Finally, the path emerges from the canyon into a wider rocky basin, opening the view toward a distant line of distinctive white trees bathed in golden hour light.
